title: Processing of Special Category Personal Data Without Explicit Controls
description: Processing special categories of data (health, biometric, racial/ethnic origin, political opinions, religion, sex life) without explicit consent or legal basis violates GDPR Article 9(1).

finding.message: Potential special category personal data processing at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}. Verify lawful basis.

references: Document the explicit legal basis under Art.9(2) for processing (explicit consent, vital interests, health care provision, etc.).
Apply enhanced encryption and access controls to special category data.
Conduct a Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) per Article 35 before processing special categories at scale.
Restrict access to special category data to the minimum number of personnel with a documented need.
GDPR Article 9(1) prohibits processing special categories except under specific conditions in Article 9(2).
